configurations.name: agricogla-llm
runtimeArgs: AWS_PROFILE=softmax-org AWS_REGION=us-west-2 exec npm run preview -- --agents llm,llm,scripted,scripted

configurations.name: agricogla-coworld-live
runtimeArgs: COGAME_HOST=127.0.0.1 COGAME_PORT=8587 COGAME_CONFIG_URI=file:///tmp/agricogla-coworld/config-live.json COGAME_RESULTS_URI=file:///tmp/agricogla-coworld/results-live.json COGAME_SAVE_REPLAY_URI=file:///tmp/agricogla-coworld/replay-live exec npx tsx src/server/coworld-main.ts

configurations.name: agricogla-replay
runtimeArgs: COGAME_HOST=127.0.0.1 COGAME_PORT=8586 COGAME_LOAD_REPLAY_URI=file:///tmp/agricogla-coworld/replay exec npx tsx src/server/coworld-main.ts
